name: snap-text
title: Snap Text
description: Capture screenshots to describe images or extract text/LaTeX using Google Gemini.
author: rayanhassan

commands.name: snap-desc
commands.title: Snap and Describe
commands.description: Capture an area of the screen and get a detailed structured description.

commands.name: snap-info
commands.title: Snap and Extract Info
commands.description: Capture an area of the screen, extract text/OCR/LaTeX, and copy it to clipboard.
